case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. ANN TAYLOR GARRETT

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARRETT, ANN TAYLOR (SBN70923) $4,277.88 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,322.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
